The game doesn't hand hold you that much at the start. All the major event stories can be unlocked just by playing the game and we don't have to wait for rerun to happen (the biggest reason for me). What are the go to Wheels for Horla, Jenkins, and 24
need good team for liz, who should I chose in selector?

The go to wheels would be their signatures, but I can give a few pointers to other alternatives. Horla can get "Rewinding Time" if you manage to get her E2 so that you can recycle her support cards with retain. Otherwise, you can't go wrong with "Incalculable Factor" for any support. For Jenkins, "Giant's Blade" for any main DPS carry. Could also use "Bloody Feast". Same set of cards mentioned for Jenkins can apply for 24, but you can also put "Beast of the Celestial Sky" for 24.
Save selector for when you give up on Liz <:KEKW:629740073977380882>
Why would you use Bloody Feast on Jenkins?

The exalt crit rate may be wasted considering that Jenkins exalt most likely gets you to 100%, but the crit damage stats it gives would help and the power gain is nice. Probably overestimating it on Jenkins, but it's been doing fine for me at least
Her exalt doesnt do direct damage though
So all you get from it is the base crit damage stat
You're right
I read it and thought it gives extra stats with the exalt, not the exalt itself
Guess I've been running Jenkins with a stat stick wheel

Tinct to set up next turn for Liz nuke. An alternative to Horla being the best ultra support is Ramona who can search for Tinct's 3 cost card to set up the burst turn more consistently (since devs decided, "Whispering Melody" doesn't deserve retain). Use any good defender like Winkle or Ogier. Honestly though, take my word for what it is cause setting up Liz is ultra painful and I gave up.

How to do this quest ? I'm so confused 🤧

I will just give a summary for dive shop goods in my opnion:
- Aigis: a nice permanent vulnerable debuffer, has a unique one turn stun debuff with devour, very athri friendly with dup
- Erica: good stat stick for Ultra, can deal dmg but not very impressive, fight for the warp effect (first card play each turn) so not recommend
- Aurita: cute jellyfish deserves all the head pats but has very low stat (higher than Leigh and Celeste lol), want to use her 0 cost a lot for the exalt nuke that can pierced shield, rouse gives her access to tentacle atk so Miryam and Tulu can buffed her 
- Winter wheel: nice if you plan to grind Aigis
- Core wheel: nice for Erica but can be used with other defense units
- Jellyfish wheel: not good for Aurita, really nice on Goliath, 24 because the wheel atk buff is based on wielder atk stat
I believe that's Arcane Enhancement (increased level cap). I assume you did it before this set of quests popped up
Dive shop also has sage stone shards: very valuable for higher skill upgrade, mimetic crytal: for skill upgrade

Metamorphosis covenants is nice for support units
Cursed Rabit is good on defense units
so just stick to the things you need the most
